request: Dashboard showing what customers look like
search_document:
User Request: Dashboard showing what customers look like

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customer Distribution by Region
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of customers across different regions
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: table
Description: Summary of customer types and their descriptions
Title: Total Number of Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Total count of unique customers
Title: Customer Orders Overview
Type: chart
Description: Total orders placed by customers over time
Title: Average Order Value by Customer Type
Type: chart
Description: Average order value segmented by customer demographics

dashboard_layout.title: Average Order Value by Customer Type

sql_queries.title: Customer Distribution by Region
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of customers across different regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Region", COUNT(DISTINCT "CustomerID") AS CustomerCount FROM "Customers" GROUP BY "Region"

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.description: Summary of customer types and their descriptions

sql_queries.title: Customer Orders Overview
sql_queries.description: Total orders placed by customers over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT DATE("OrderDate") AS OrderDate, COUNT("OrderID") AS TotalOrders FROM "Orders" GROUP BY DATE("OrderDate") ORDER BY OrderDate

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value by Customer Type
sql_queries.description: Average order value segmented by customer demographics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c."CustomerTypeID", AVG(od."UnitPrice" * od."Quantity" * (1 - od."Discount")) AS AverageOrderValue FROM "Orders" o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o."OrderID" = od."OrderID" JOIN "CustomerCustomerDemo" ccd ON o."CustomerID" = ccd."CustomerID" JOIN "CustomerDemographics" c ON ccd."CustomerTypeID" = c."CustomerTypeID" GROUP BY c."CustomerTypeID"
